title: Software Engineering TA - Lab Support
requirements: Familiar with software development lifecycle, unit testing, and agile methodologies.
description: Support weekly software engineering labs and guide students through Java exercises and testing practices.

title: Software Engineering TA - Tutorial Support
requirements: Understanding of UML diagrams, design patterns, and technical documentation.
description: Assist tutorial sessions for software design and help students with UML modelling exercises.

title: Software Engineering TA - Coursework Support
requirements: Experience with version control, code review workflows, and Python development.
description: Help students with coursework projects, Git workflows, and code review sessions.
